content.full_text:
February 6, 1991

Kathryn Ellen Donovan
Fair Political Practices Commission
428 J Street - Suite 800
Sacramento, Ca. 95814

Re: AFL-CIO v. FPPC, U.S. District Ct.
No. Civ. S-89-433 LW

Dear Ms. Donovan:

I had heard that in the above case an order has been entered which goes beyond the initial ruling invalidating sections 82015, 85302, and 85303 to invalidate additional provisions of Proposition 73.

Could you please confirm whether there was a subsequent ruling (other than on attorneys' fees), and if there was such a ruling, send me a copy at the above address?

Also, could you please advise me whether (if you know) the FPPC intends to appeal the validation of portions of Proposition 73?

Yours very truly,

Carl P.A. Nelson

CN:jhj
